class.name: CountryInspector
class.brief_description: Custom inspector for displaying and editing country data.
class.description: Used as a base for .gd scripts that aim to create a custom inspector interface. This is used to edit and view parsed country data.

method.name: create_containers
method.description: Should be the first thing called on "parse_begin()". Initializes the top UI nodes used to display the inspector.

members.member: Button used to clear the search query.
Data used for display in the inspector. It should be set on "parse_begin()" as the object that is currently selected.
Child of "scroll_container", that holds all the relevant data.
Button at the top of the inspector tab, that parses all files, caches the data and displays.
Scroll container, holds the tree structure formed from the country data.
Container used for search queries on provines or countries. It searches for names, as well as IDs.
Line edit used for getting the user input in the search query.
